signals.headline: Kerala Assembly Elections: Congress-IUML Seat-Sharing Confirmed at 95-27 Seats** | YES | HIGH confidence[2]
signals.raw:
Kerala Assembly Elections: Congress-IUML Seat-Sharing Confirmed at 95-27 Seats** | YES | HIGH confidence[2]  
Congress and Indian Union Muslim League (IUML) will contest 95 and 27 seats respectively in the 140-seat Kerala assembly polls, matching IUML's 2021 allocation, as announced ahead of voting[1][2][5].

signals.headline: SOUTH KOREA INFLATION RISES TO 2
signals.raw:
SOUTH KOREA INFLATION RISES TO 2.2% IN MARCH 2026, BELOW FORECASTS AMID OIL SHOCKS | NO | MED confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in prior months, missing market expectations of 2.4% despite pressures from global energy volatility linked to Middle East conflicts.[1] This data, released around early April 2026, shows contained price pressures
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: IUML Leader Promises Free UAE Trips to Party Workers for Poll Wins, Triggers MCC Probe** | YES | MED confidence[3]
signals.raw:
IUML Leader Promises Free UAE Trips to Party Workers for Poll Wins, Triggers MCC Probe** | YES | MED confidence[3]  
IUML's C.P. Bava Haji offered fully sponsored 15-day UAE trips to workers delivering highest vote margins for UDF candidate V.S. Joy in Thavanur, prompting election officials to investigate potential Model Code of Conduct violations; UDF calls it internal motivation[3].
